metadata.description:
The subject is a woman appearing to be in her 40s. She has fair skin with some fine lines visible around her eyes and forehead. Her face is oval-shaped with a gently rounded jawline. Her hair is medium-length, wavy, and a warm auburn color, with some lighter strands near the temples, styled loosely around her face.

Her eyes are a dark brown, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. Her eyebrows are medium thickness and naturally arched. Her nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. Her lips are medium thickness with a well-defined cupid's bow.

She has a few small moles on her cheek and forehead. Her expression is thoughtful and serene, with her head turned slightly to the left and angled slightly upwards.
metadata.anchor: Thoughtful expression with auburn wavy hair.
